data.en: It's library day again!
data.cn: 又是图书馆日了！

data.en: But it keeps raining and raining.
data.cn: 但雨一直下个不停。
data.hint: keep doing sth. 一直做某事。

data.en: Mum, will the 'horse library' come today?
data.cn: 妈妈，“马背图书馆”今天会来吗？
data.hint: will 引导的一般将来时疑问句。

data.en: It comes every week, rain or sun.
data.cn: 无论下雨还是晴天，它每周都来。

data.en: Did you also have library day in the past, Mum?
data.cn: 妈妈，以前你们也有图书馆日吗？

data.en: Our library only came one time a month.
data.cn: 我们的图书馆每个月只来一次。
data.hint: one time a month 每月一次。

data.en: Were there many books?
data.cn: 有很多书吗？
data.hint: there be 句型的过去式疑问句。

data.en: It was a small library.
data.cn: 那是一个小型图书馆。
data.hint: was 是 is 的过去式。

data.en: Books made me happy.
data.cn: 书让我感到快乐。

data.en: The library brings not only books but also hope.
data.cn: 图书馆不仅带来了书，还带来了希望。
data.hint: not only... but also... 不仅……而且……

data.en: Did you see our town's first street library?
data.cn: 你看到我们镇上第一个街头图书馆了吗？

data.en: Can you tell me more about the library?
data.cn: 你能告诉我更多关于图书馆的事吗？

data.en: I want to get more people to read.
data.cn: 我想让更多的人阅读。
data.hint: want to do sth. 想做某事。

data.en: Were there many books at first?
data.cn: 起初有很多书吗？

data.en: But we have more books now.
data.cn: 但我们现在有更多的书了。

data.en: Were there any difficulties in your work in the past?
data.cn: 过去你的工作中有什么困难吗？

data.en: The road was hard to ride on.
data.cn: 路很难骑行。
data.hint: be hard to do sth. 难于做某事。

data.en: Do you enjoy your job?
data.cn: 你喜欢你的工作吗？

data.en: Children like you love the books.
data.cn: 像你这样的孩子喜欢这些书。

data.en: I feel so happy.
data.cn: 我感到非常开心。

data.en: Mary was a ten-year-old girl.
data.cn: 玛丽是一个十岁的女孩。

data.en: She lost her parents and had to live with her uncle.
data.cn: 她失去了父母，不得不和她的叔叔住在一起。

data.en: But her uncle was often away.
data.cn: 但她的叔叔经常不在家。

data.en: Her cousin Colin was ill in bed.
data.cn: 她的表弟科林卧病在床。
data.hint: ill in bed 生病卧床。

data.en: Mary didn't care about others and was often angry.
data.cn: 玛丽不关心别人，而且经常生气。

data.en: She was unhappy in the new place.
data.cn: 她在新地方很不开心。

data.en: One day she found an old garden.
data.cn: 有一天她发现了一个旧花园。
data.hint: found 是 find 的过去式。

data.en: They worked together to bring the garden back to life.
data.cn: 他们共同努力使花园恢复生机。
data.hint: bring back to life 使恢复生机。

data.en: Mary slowly became friendly and kind.
data.cn: 玛丽慢慢变得友好和善良了。
data.hint: became 是 become 的过去式。

data.en: She also helped Colin to get well.
data.cn: 她还帮助科林康复了。

data.en: It's a great book about friends, love and nature.
data.cn: 这是一本关于朋友、爱和大自然的好书。

data.en: I love the words about flowers and trees in the book.
data.cn: 我喜欢书里关于花草树木的文字。

data.en: They are beautiful.
data.cn: 它们很美。

data.en: Would you like to read The Secret Garden?
data.cn: 你想读《秘密花园》吗？
data.hint: Would you like to...? 你想……吗？

data.en: He enjoyed telling stories to children.
data.cn: 他喜欢给孩子们讲故事。
data.hint: enjoy doing sth. 喜欢做某事。

data.en: He wrote many books for children.
data.cn: 他为孩子们写了很多书。
data.hint: wrote 是 write 的过去式。

data.en: People will always remember him and his great stories.
data.cn: 人们将永远记住他和他的伟大故事。

data.en: My favourite writer is Ye Yonglie.
data.cn: 我最喜欢的作家是叶永烈。

data.en: He wrote many science fiction books.
data.cn: 他写了很多科幻小说。

data.en: His stories make me laugh.
data.cn: 他的故事逗我笑。
data.hint: make sb. do sth. 让某人做某事。

data.en: People celebrate World Book Day every year on 23 April.
data.cn: 人们每年在4月23日庆祝世界读书日。

data.en: It's a day for people to show their love of books.
data.cn: 这是一个让人们表达对书籍热爱的日子。
data.hint: love of books 对书的热爱。

data.en: How do you celebrate World Book Day?
data.cn: 你如何庆祝世界读书日？

data.en: Sit down and read your favourite book.
data.cn: 坐下来读你最喜欢的书。

data.en: Dress like your favourite character.
data.cn: 打扮成你最喜欢的角色。

data.en: Act out your favourite stories.
data.cn: 表演你最喜欢的故事。

data.en: Paint pictures for books.
data.cn: 为书画插图。

data.en: Make bookmarks for your family and friends.
data.cn: 为你的家人和朋友制作书签。

data.en: I'm going to visit a bookshop and buy a new book.
data.cn: 我打算去书店买一本新书。
data.hint: be going to do 打算做……

data.en: I'm going to give some of my books to a library.
data.cn: 我打算把我的一些书捐给图书馆。
data.hint: give sth. to ... 把某物给……
